heading: Benefit certificates
label: 1972 Benefit certificates
text: The Secretary shall arrange to have each member insured under a policy purchased under receive a certificate setting forth the benefits to which the member is entitled thereunder, to whom such benefit shall be payable, to whom claims should be submitted, and summarizing the provisions of the policy principally affecting the member. Such certificate shall be in lieu of the certificate which the insurance company or companies would otherwise be required to issue.section 1966 of this title
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 772 of this title, substituted “1966” for “766”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1), (2)(E), substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 4(b)(1)
